arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Newcastle United preparing to move for another academy star?
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly giving consideration to making an approach for another Chelsea academy star.

arts.ttl: 'I trained with Jadon Sancho - Man Utd have made a huge transfer mistake'
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho fell out of favour at Manchester United after a dispute with manager Erik ten Hag - who initially dropped him over his training displays - but the winger is already looking happier on loan at Chelsea

arts.ttl: £20m Chelsea player had his heart set on joining PL club in the summer before a transfer collapsed - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea’s first-team player reportedly had his heart set on joining a rival club in the summer before the deal fell apart. The Blues were very...

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho backed for big season at Chelsea as Man Utd point made
arts.sum: Speaking to Paddy Power, Sagna said: "I trained with Jadon Sancho when he was 16, at Manchester City, and rated him as one of the best talents I’ve seen. It's fair to say it just hasn't quite worked out for Sancho in the Premier League yet after falling out with Erik ten Hag at Man Utd. The Englishman has a fresh chance in west London, however, and former Gunners star Sagna believes that's exactly what he needs.

arts.ttl: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui gives his assessment of Chelsea's squad ahead of London derby
arts.sum: 'They have a good coach, and good ideas about how to play.'

arts.ttl: Report: What Estevao Willian has already made 'clear' to Chelsea about the position he wants to play
arts.sum: The arrival of Estevao Willian at Chelsea in 2025 is extremely exciting and one that supporters can’t wait to see. Chelsea confirmed back in June...

arts.ttl: Chelsea star’s worrying injury record forcing Enzo Maresca into tough decision
arts.sum: Chelsea have major concerns over Reece James’ injury record. The 24-year-old has struggled with injuries and fitness-related problems for most of his senior career with his latest setback coming in the form of a hamstring strain. The right-back, who was made the Blues’ captain last year, has yet to feature this season and there remains […] The post Chelsea star’s worrying injury record forcing Enzo Maresca into tough decision appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Journalist: Another West Ham star doubt for Chelsea showdown
arts.sum: Niclas Fullkrug is a doubt for the West Ham United clash against Chelsea in the Premier League on 21 September, according to Nizaar Kinsella. The... The post Journalist: Another West Ham star doubt for Chelsea showdown appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: English talent who left Chelsea behind is flying in Champions League
arts.sum: The London-born starlet - whose full name is Jamie Jermaine Bynoe-Gittens - spent some time with Chelsea in his young days but chose to reject the Premier League club's offer to continue his development there. The English winger is currently making his mark on the biggest stage of club football after coming off the bench to score two late goals for Borussia Dortmund in their 3-0 victory over Club Brugge in the Champions League on Wednesday (September 18).

arts.ttl: Maresca to consider two big Chelsea changes vs West Ham with Sancho starting
arts.sum: Jackson has started all four Premier League matches this term - and with two goals in the process, it is hardly a bad return from the 23-year-old striker. At the weekend, there were a few players that came off the bench and made a real claim to be included in the line-up for Saturday afternoon's game against West Ham United at the London Stadium.
